My Apps
Works offline · Free forever

Install this app on your home screen for instant one-tap access — no App Store needed.

    Tap ⎙ Share at the bottom of Safari, then Add to Home Screen

    Your toolkit

    Seven apps.
    One file.

    Each app is crafted for everyday use — private, offline-first, and designed to feel native on any device.

    01
    Shopping · Shopping
    Shopping List
    Build multiple shopping lists with quantities and prices. Get a live total so you never overspend or forget an item again.
    📋
    Multiple named lists
    Create unlimited lists, each with a custom name and emoji icon.
    🔢
    Qty & price per item
    Track quantity and price; the running total updates instantly.
    ✏️
    Inline editing
    Edit any item inline without leaving your list.
    💾
    Auto-saved locally
    Everything is saved to your browser — no account needed.

    02
    Calendar · Scheduling
    To-Do
    A beautiful calendar planner with a to-do–style list view. Click any day to add appointments, get today highlighted at a glance, and export everything with one tap.
    📆
    Interactive calendar view
    Browse month by month — tap any date to instantly add an appointment for that day.
    ✨
    Today highlight & colour coding
    Today is always highlighted on the calendar. Each appointment gets its own colour with coloured squares marking busy days.
    📝
    Rich description with list signs
    Add bullets, dashes, numbered lists, checkboxes, stars and arrows directly inside the description field.
    📤
    Export JSON & CSV
    Download your data or print a clean summary sheet anytime.

    03
    Notes · Ideas
    Quick Notes
    Capture thoughts the moment they strike. Coloured notes with pin support, instant search, and multiple sort modes — always ready.
    🎨
    10 colour themes
    Cycle through 10 palettes with one tap to organise by colour.
    📌
    Pin to top
    Pin important notes so they always float above the rest.
    🔍
    Instant search
    Filter by title or content as you type — zero delay.
    ⊞
    Grid & list views
    Switch between a masonry grid and a compact list layout.

    Measurements · Science
    Unit Converter
    Convert between 100+ units across 10 categories — from everyday cooking to physics. Includes a 12h/24h clock tool and recent history.
    📐
    10 categories, 100+ units
    Length, weight, temp, time, speed, area, volume, data, energy & pressure.
    🕐
    12h ↔ 24h clock
    Instantly convert between clock formats with a full day reference.
    ⇄
    One-tap swap
    Reverse from/to units with the swap button instantly.
    🕓
    Conversion history
    Last 5 conversions shown for quick re-use.
    06
    Finance · Exchange
    Currency Converter
    Convert between world currencies — fully offline. You enter the exchange rates once, the app handles all the math. No internet required, no API keys needed.
    ⌨️
    Manual rate entry
    Enter your own exchange rates once and save them — convert anytime, even offline.
    📋
    Multiple target currencies
    Add as many target currencies as you need and see all results at once.
    ⇄
    Instant swap
    Flip the source and target currencies with a single tap.
    📴
    Fully offline
    Saved rates work without internet — perfect for travel.

    Security · Passwords
    Vault
    A private, password-protected credential manager that lives entirely in your browser. Store logins, search instantly, and export a backup whenever you need.
    🔑
    Master password lock
    Auto-locks after 30 min inactivity. Your data never leaves the device.
    🗂️
    Groups & filters
    Organise by Personal, Work, Client and filter with one tap.
    📋
    One-tap copy
    Copy usernames, passwords or emails to clipboard instantly.
    💾
    Export & import
    Download a JSON backup and restore it on any device.

    Maths · Productivity
    Calculator
    A full-featured calculator with two modes in one — standard arithmetic for everyday use, and a scientific calculator with trigonometry, logarithms, memory functions, and more.
    🔢
    Standard mode
    Clean four-function calculator with percentage, sign toggle, and calculation history.
    📐
    Scientific mode
    Trig (sin/cos/tan), logarithms, powers, roots, factorial, constants π & e, and full memory (MS/MR/M+/M−/MC).
    🕓
    Calculation history
    Last 8 calculations shown as tappable chips — reuse any result instantly.
    ⌨️
    Keyboard support
    Full keyboard input on desktop — type numbers and operators naturally.
    About this project
    Built for
    everyday
    simplicity
    My Apps is a personal toolkit — six handcrafted apps that handle the small but important things in daily life, all in a single offline-capable file.
    6
    Apps included in one file
    100+
    Conversion units built-in
    0
    Server calls — fully offline
    01
    What makes this different
    🔒
    Privacy by design
    All your data stays in your browser's local storage. Nothing is transmitted to any server. No accounts, no tracking, no analytics. Your data is yours — full stop.
    ⚡
    Instant & offline
    No loading screens or login walls. Works completely offline once the page is open.
    📦
    One portable file
    The entire suite — all seven apps — lives in a single HTML file you can save anywhere and share freely.
    📱
    Mobile-first
    Designed for touch with fluid layouts that feel native on phones and tablets.
    🎨
    Considered design
    Every spacing, colour, and animation decision is intentional — calm and focused, never noisy.
    🔧
    Zero dependencies
    Pure HTML, CSS and JS. No frameworks, no build tools, no package managers required.
    02
    Built with the web platform

    Every app is written in plain HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Data persistence uses the browser's built-in localStorage — so your data stays local and always belongs to you.

    HTML5
    CSS3
    Vanilla JS
    localStorage API
    Google Fonts
    Fetch API
    Ready to
    get started?
